arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany makes Aston Villa and Bayer Leverkusen comparison ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany said it feels like a fortnight ago that they played against Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen because he has prepared so thoroughly for the Champions League clash against Aston Villa. Under new boss Kompany, Bayern have won six of their first seven games in all competitions this season and have scored a total of 30 goals.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane faces late fitness test as Bayern Munich prepare for Aston Villa game
arts.sum: Kane suffered an ankle injury during Bayern’s Bundesliga draw with German champions Bayer Leverkusen on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Bayern Munich injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Aston Villa and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery vows to stick to his guns ahead of Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery is preparing for a Champions League clash against German giants Bayern Munich on Tuesday, but has vowed he will not change his ways ahead of the match

Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. FC Bayern München - Wed, Oct 2nd 2024, 20:00 Aston Villa have been finalising their preparations for the visit of Bayern Munich. Unai Emery’s side made a winning start to their UEFA Champions League campaign on matchday one with a 3-0 triumph over BSC Young Boys. Bayern, six-time winners of Europe’s elite club competition and last season’s semi-finalists, are the visitors to Villa Park on Wednesday night for the club’s first home match of the competition. And the Villans have been training at Bodymoor Heath in readiness for the encounter. You can view a gallery of images below…

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins pays tribute to Aston Villa's secret weapon ahead of Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins has been reflecting on the club's journey under Unai Emery ahead of their mouth-watering Champions League tie with Bayern Munich

arts.ttl: Villa set for 'special' 1st UCL home game since '84
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has said his club's first home game in the top tier of European football for 41 years will be a "special" occasion as Bayern Munich visit Villa Park on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Full Ollie Watkins press conference as Aston Villa striker pays ultimate compliment to Unai Emery
arts.sum: It's been a long time since Champions League nights have been at Villa Park, I think everyone’s excited and looking forward to it. "I don’t think so, we have players who have played in the Champions League from different clubs so we do have that experience there.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa to end 41-year wait for Champions League when Bayern Munich pays a visit
arts.sum: The last time Villa played a home match in the European Cup — as it was then known — was as the defending champion in 1983. “It’s been a long time since Champions League nights at Villa Park — everyone is excited and looking forward to it,” striker Ollie Watkins said Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery responds to Diego Carlos criticism and fires Aston Villa warning
arts.sum: I am trying to correct it through video and working with the players on the pitch. Asked how Villa will stop Kane, Emery said: "We analyse the tactical areas collectively and then you have to stop the players.
